	mov R7, #0F4h	; 244  -12 'ô'
	mov R6, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_0002
	mov DPTR, #dptr_7FD5
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F7h	; 247   -9 '÷'
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

jump_11E4:
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	inc R7
	mov 00h, @R0
	jc jump_11E4
	mov 90h, @R0
	mov R5, A
	dec DPTR
	mov R4, #05h	;   5
jump_11F5:
	inc DPTR
	mov A, 82h
	orl A, 83h
	jnz jump_11F5
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_7FD5
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	movx @DPTR, A
	orl 87h, #01h	;   1
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_7FD5
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R7, #0Dh	;  13
	mov R6, #00h	;   0
	lcall jump_0002
	mov DPTR, #dptr_7FD5
; overlapping 2 byte(s)

org	121Ch
jump_121C:
	mov R7, #0D6h	; 214  -42 'Ö'

org	121Eh
	movx A, @DPTR

org	121Fh
	anl A, #0FEh	; 254   -2 'þ'

org	1221h
	movx @DPTR, A

org	1222h
	ret


org	1223h
	lcall fwd_0E32_jump_E4F4

org	1226h
	lcall jump_0F94

org	1229h
	mov DPTR, #dptr_7FD5

org	122Ch
	movx A, @DPTR

org	122Dh
	jnb 20h.0, jump_1230
jump_1230:
	nop
	nop
	inc R7
	xch A, @R0
	nop
	inc R1
	mov A, @R1
	rr A
	lcall jump_0FA4
	lcall jump_0CB0
	ret

	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop

end
